name: TEST - Customer Mismatch Warning (CIB)
trigger_condition:
(
  not is_empty(field.recipient_match)
  and not is_empty(field.recipient_name_match)
  and not is_empty(field.recipient_name_export)
  and field.recipient_name_match != field.recipient_name_export
)

payload.content: The customer on the backing document PO/Contract is different from the customer matched on the document.
The customer on the backing document PO/Contract is different from the customer matched on the document.
